channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Glassmaking
item.description: A set of mechanics for creating glass-related recipes

item.title: Extra Overlays-1.22+
item.description: same as https://mods.vintagestory.at/extraoverlays working on vesion 1.22.0+

item.title: Chunk Loader
item.description: Allows players to keep chunks active when far away via customizable chat commands.

item.title: SoldierSpy - Brassworks
item.description: An expansion upon what can be done with brass. Made with love & pain. No AI.

item.title: Ozzie's Clothing
item.description: A simple clothing mod, this is my first attempt at modding so don't expect it to be that good.

item.title: Simulated Water Runoff
item.description: While raining, drips will spawn on overhanging block faces and drip down realistically

item.title: Echoes of the Drift
item.description: Work-in-progress quest campaign - wake the Resonant Atlas and hunt echoes by compass.

item.title: Fixes for Salvation Engine Server
item.description: Fixes for Salvation Engine Server

item.title: Dar's Server Utilities
item.description: Combines my mods with the intent to be used specifically on Sundered Isles Server

item.title: CaveContent fork
item.description: A fork of CaveContent to make it work with 1.22

item.title: Aldi's Classes [Homesteader PATCH]
item.description: Homesteader made just for Aldi's Classes. Mostly balanced, always fun

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: PinyinSearch
item.description: 在复古物语中使用拼音搜索信息

item.title: Immersive Woodworking
item.description: Focused immersion mod that makes processing timber feel like work, not paperwork.

item.title: PicoStackables
item.description: Multiply item & block stack sizes, with per-item overrides and a live in-game config editor.

item.title: Ithania Expanded Fishing
item.description: Raise your own worms, craft custom baits, and trap live fish. Fishing, fully expanded.

item.title: VSA_API
item.description: VSA API

item.title: VSA - Replica
item.description: Build block-made moving ships and structures

item.title: BetterEr Prospecting
item.description: Altered prospecting experience with focus on reducing randomness

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: One With The Thread Only
item.description: Adds cheaper flax crafting recipes to the tailor.

item.title: Secret Foxfire 1.22 Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for my community 1.22 server.

item.title: Vintage Canvas
item.description: Craft canvases, mix paint, and use brushes to decorate your world!

item.title: CollapseStory
item.description: Adds structural and material physics to building blocks, and greatly expands beam functionality.

item.title: LogicalNerfsDirection
item.description: Removes compass-like tells from placement of the roller, knapping surfaces and clay forms.

item.title: LogicalNerfsChisel
item.description: Removes 4³ and 8³ chisel brush sizes and makes rock(not stone) chiseled blocks 8x slower to break.

item.title: Medic Tailor Improvements
item.description: A simple mod to give the tailor class some more functionality beyond drip.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: ModsUpdater For Linux
item.description: Your go-to buddy for always-up-to-date Vintage Story mods - Not a mod, but a program -

item.title: ModsUpdater For macOS
item.description: Your go-to buddy for always-up-to-date Vintage Story mods - Not a mod, but a program -
